name: pi-ui-design
description: Visual frontend prototyping tool for pi — drag, drop, theme, export code in HTML/React/Tailwind

scripts.build:wasm: cd wasm && bash -c 'source ../emsdk_tmp/emsdk_env.sh 2>/dev/null && emcmake cmake -B build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && cmake --build build && cp build/engine.wasm build/engine.js ../public/dist/' || (echo "Error: emscripten not found. Run: source emsdk_tmp/emsdk_env.sh"; exit 1)
